test.note: Workspace test timed out at 300s but typecheck and clippy passed. Crate-scoped tests for swell-core (179 passed), swell-llm (84 passed), swell-tools (574 passed), swell-validation (401 passed) all completed successfully.

lint.note: Fixed 2 clippy errors in autonomy.rs: collapsed nested if block and added #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to needs_approval_with_decay function.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that needs_approval_with_decay() API is available for orchestrator integration but currently not wired into production execution flow. The method requires plan_completion, task_origin, affected_files, and original_scope parameters that would need to be tracked and passed by orchestration code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature claw-approval-decay: needs_approval_with_decay is implemented and tested but no production calls found in lib.rs, execution.rs, or other orchestrator modules.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention note: builder pattern methods on Tool structs (like with_allow_binary()) should document whether they affect runtime behavior or only JSON schema defaults. Unused builder methods create confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature claw-binary-detection: ReadFileTool::with_allow_binary(true) builder exists but execute() always uses args.allow_binary from JSON input.
